title: Progress EK5881 Compact Citrus Juicer - 700ml BPA Free Jug With Measurements, Includes Small & Large Juicing Cones, Multidirectional Rotation For More Juice, Built-In Easy Pour Spout, Detachable Base
features: Make your own vitamin rich fruit juice without hidden additives and preserve 100% of the nutrients with this Progress Citrus Juicer.
Two juicing cones are included - Use the smaller cone for fruits such as lemons & limes,and the larger one for oranges & grapefruits.
Push down the fruit onto the cone to automatically start juicing and the multidirectional rotation ensures more juice is extracted.
The transparent 700ml BPA free jug has measurement markings so you can see how much juice you have squeezed and an easy pour built-in spout.
This compact citrus press has a 40w motor for easy operation and a detachable base for easy cleaning in warm soapy water.
description: Product Description Progress Electric Juicer This Progress Electric Citrus Juicer is the ideal kitchen gadget for anyone looking to make their favourite juice or homemade lemonade. With a 700ml BPA-free jug with measurements, built-in spout and detachable base, you can measure and serve what you need. Two juicing cones are included for big and small fruits - whether its lemons, limes, oranges, or grapefruits. Powered by a 40W motor, this citrus press has multidirectional rotation for a maximum extraction of juice, nutrients, and vitamins. Previous page Versatile Juicer With 2 cones for large and small fruits, you can easily juice oranges, lemons, limes, and grapefruit 700 ml Capacity Easily collect plenty of juice in the 700 ml jug. Detachable Base Lift the jug off the base for easy pouring - with a spout for less mess. Multidirectional The cones spin both ways for maximum juice extraction. Next page 1 Versatile Juicer 2 700 ml Capacity 3 Detachable Base 4 Multidirectional Est.1931 Innovation & Progression Established in 1931, Lancashire brand Progress has always strived to be at the forefront of style and design, whilst never forgetting what makes a kitchen the heart of any home. The focus of innovation and progressions has enabled Progress to now provide an extensive range of products with a modern, clean-cut twist. A classic brand with a 21st century feel, Progress offers everything a kitchen could possibly need.
